zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Leybourne於大約1250年出生在英國肯特萊波恩時，他的父親Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports37歲，母親Eleanor de Ferrers15歲。他和Idonia de Veteripont至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1283年在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Leybourne于大约1250年出生在英国肯特萊波恩时，他的父亲Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports37岁，母亲Eleanor de Ferrers15岁。他和Idonia de Veteripont至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1283年在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Leybourne was born about 1250, in Leybourne, Kent, England, his father, Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor de Ferrers, was 15. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Idonia de Veteripont. He died in 1283, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Leybourne est né environ 1250, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Ferrers, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Idonia de Veteripont. Il est décédé en 1283, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Leybourne um 1250 in Leybourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Ferrers 15. Er hatte mit Idonia de Veteripont mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Leybourne è nato il circa 1250 nel Leybourne, Kent, England, il suo padre, Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Ferrers, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Idonia de Veteripont. Morì nel 1283, nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourneが約1250年にイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Portsは37歳，母Eleanor de Ferrersは15歳であった。彼はIdonia de Veteripontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1283年にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourne(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Ferrers(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Idonia de Veteripont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Leybourne nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Ferrers, tinha 15 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Leybourne родился около 1250 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Ferrers, 15. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Idonia de Veteripont. Он умер в 1283 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
